message:
test(sqlmodel): add shard_key integration tests

Adds comprehensive tests for horizontal sharding support:

Test models:
- TenantData: shard_key on non-optional tenant_id field
- RegionalData: shard_key on optional region field
- UnshardedData: model without shard_key (control case)

Test coverage:
- SHARD_KEY constant returns correct field name or None
- shard_key_value() returns Value for non-optional fields
- shard_key_value() returns None when optional field is None
- shard_key_value() returns Value when optional field is Some
- Unsharded models return None for shard_key_value()

These tests verify the derive macro correctly generates both the
SHARD_KEY constant and shard_key_value() method for all field types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
